# services.nntp-proxy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nntp-proxy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nntp-proxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable NNTP-Proxy. |
| `services.nntp-proxy.listenAddress` | `string` | Proxy listen address (IPv6 literal addresses need to be enclosed in "[" and "]" characters) |
| `services.nntp-proxy.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Proxy listen port |
| `services.nntp-proxy.prohibitPosting` | `boolean` | Whether to prohibit posting to the upstream server |
| `services.nntp-proxy.sslCert` | `string` | Proxy ssl certificate path |
| `services.nntp-proxy.sslKey` | `string` | Proxy ssl key path |
| `services.nntp-proxy.upstreamMaxConnections` | `signed integer` | Upstream server maximum allowed concurrent connections |
| `services.nntp-proxy.upstreamPassword` | `string` | Upstream server password |
| `services.nntp-proxy.upstreamPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Upstream server port |
| `services.nntp-proxy.upstreamServer` | `string` | Upstream server address |
| `services.nntp-proxy.upstreamUser` | `string` | Upstream server username |
| `services.nntp-proxy.users` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | NNTP-Proxy user configuration |
| `services.nntp-proxy.users.<name>.maxConnections` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of concurrent connections to the proxy for this user |
| `services.nntp-proxy.users.<name>.passwordHash` | `string` | SHA-512 password hash (can be generated by `mkpasswd -m sha-512 <password>`) |
| `services.nntp-proxy.users.<name>.username` | `string` | Username |
| `services.nntp-proxy.verbosity` | `one of "error", "warning", "notice", "info", "debug"` | Verbosity level |
